findings.summary: ProfileBadge component exists and is integrated into SessionItem
findings.details: The ProfileBadge renders a colored pill with icon + name. SessionItem conditionally shows it when session.profile is set. Component at apps/desktop/src/components/agent-builder/shared/ProfileBadge.tsx.

findings.summary: No sessions have profiles assigned, so badges are not visible
findings.details: All checked sessions have no profile property set. Cannot visually verify badge rendering without creating a session via an agent profile.
